title: erucastrum procumbens
intro: Erucastrum procumbens, also known as dog's mustart or rocket weed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as bloating, gas, and diarrhea. The health benefits of Erucastrum procumbens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Erucastrum procumbens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a dietary supplement or used topically to soothe skin irritations.
